narrative:
Cardinal Local Sd (Geauga) school district has 6,489 registered voters, with 58.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -11.1% D−R vs -28.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
